system.description:
@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.C5Gi6kQzgzU9b2vS]{Airmid}

Protector of apothecaries and teacher of purifying arts.

Domains: exorcism, healing, plants

Merge

Herbalist's Favor

When you summon this Arcanum, you gain 3 Medicine Points. When this Arcanum is dismissed, you lose all Medicine Points.

Once per turn during a conflict, you may perform the Skill action and spend 1 Medicine Point to choose one ally you can see. If you do, that ally recovers an amount of Hit Points equal to your Crisis score and recovers from a single status effect of your choice.

Dismiss

Cleansing Roots

You deal 20 earth damage to every enemy you can see, or 30 earth damage if you had no Medicine Points left when you dismiss this Arcanum. Then, if one or more enemies that lost Hit Points this way are affected by one or more spells with a duration of "Scene", they stop being affected by those spells.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.ZMkAsaD2ekMizlYg]{Baihu}

The white tiger of the West, ruling over battle and beasts.

Domains: beasts, metal, wind

Merge

Presence of the Great Tiger

When you deal damage, you may change its type to air or physical.

When you deal damage for the first time on your turn during a conflict, as long as that damage is air or physical and your Defense score is equal to or higher than 12, you deal 5 extra damage and that damage ignores Resistances.

Dismiss

Wind and Steel

Choose one option:

  • You deal 30 air damage to every enemy you can see.

  • Until the end of the current scene, you and every ally present on the scene may treat your Defense score as being equal to 12 (you may use the normal score if better). This score increases to 13 if you are level 20 or higher, or to 14 if you are level 40 or higher.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.VligC3jj4sOcvP0a]{Damocles}

The ghastly sword, looming over tyrants.

Domains: dread, hesitation, punishment

Merge

Impending Judgment

You gain Resistance to dark and light damage.

Once per turn during a conflict, you may perform the Skill action to choose one enemy you can see and choose one action among the following: Attack, Guard, Objective, and Spell. If you do, until the start of your next turn that enemy loses 10 Hit Points whenever they perform the chosen action (after the action has been resolved). This amount increases to 20 Hit Points if you are level 30 or higher.

Dismiss

Rain of Swords

You deal 30 light damage to every enemy you can see. Each creature that loses Hit Points due to this damage suffers shaken.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.6Ni4vBwTODsXnc1A]{Fafnir}

The invulnerable chtonic dragon, who guards legendary treasures.

Domains: fire, protection, wealth

Merge

Scales of the Ardent Sovereign

You gain Resistance to fire damage. Additionally, as long as you are not in Crisis, you also gain Resistance to physical damage.

All damage you deal becomes fire, its type cannot change, and it ignores Resistances; as long as you are in Crisis, it also ignores Immunities.

When you deal damage to only one creature with a spell, you deal 10 extra damage.

Dismiss

Molten Gold

You deal 20 fire damage to every enemy you can see, or 30 fire damage if you are in Crisis; this damage ignores Immunities and Resistances. Then, you and every ally present on the scene regain 2 Inventory Points for every enemy reduced to 0 Hit Points by this damage.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.ZWCPjjDOViHlvgEc]{Huginn & Muninn}

The twin ravens, messengers and spies of the gods.

Domains: knowledge, memory, storms

Merge

Winged Messengers

You gain Resistance to air and bolt damage, and you are immune to dazed.

At the end of your turn during a conflict, you may choose one creature you can see. If you do, choose one option: the Game Master reveals one of that creature's Traits; or, the Game Master reveals that creature's Affinity to one damage type of your choice.

Dismiss

Stormborn Twins

Choose air or bolt. You deal 20 damage of the chosen type to one creature you can see; then, you deal 20 damage of the other type to one creature you can see (the same or a different one). Damage dealt by this effect ignores Resistances, and it ignores the Immunities of any creature you know two or more Traits of.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.Sfsuz6nJWErVBvg8]{Lady Higanbana}

The tearful spirit who mourns those fallen in battle.

Domains: death, isolation, melancholy

Merge

Scarlet Blossoms

If you have acquired the Counterattack Skill, it also applies to enemy ranged attacks.

During conflict scenes, as long as you are merged with this Arcanum and it is not your turn, your attacks deal 5 extra damage, or 10 extra damage if you are also in Crisis.

Dismiss

Sepulchral Shroud

You deal 40 dark damage to one creature you can see; damage dealt by this effect ignores Immunities and Resistances. If a creature loses Hit Points this way, they cannot recover Hit Points until the start of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.1ZMtdobRdrdMZLjL]{Maneki-Neko}

The ever-grinning patron of gamblers.

Domains: coincidences, prosperity, unforeseen events

Merge

Paw Slap

After you roll dice for a Magic Check or Accuracy Check, you may choose one of the numbers shown on those dice: that number becomes your meowgic nyamber and replaces any meowgic nyamber you previously obtained.

After a creature you can see rolls dice for a Check, if you have a meowgic nyamber, you may expend it to replace the number shown by one of those dice with that number. You cannot use this effect on a Check that generated a meowgic nyamber, and you cannot generate a meowgic nyamber with a Check you used this effect on.

When this Arcanum is dismissed, if you have a meowgic nyamber, you lose it.

Dismiss

Coin Cascade

You deal 30 physical damage to every enemy you can see. If you lost a meowgic nyamber by dismissing this Arcanum, the type of this damage changes based on the number you lost: air (1 and 6), bolt (2 and 7), fire (3 and 8), ice (4 and 9), earth (5 and 10), dark (11 or higher).

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.d1LEGde56neUIAeZ]{Marchosias}

The most courageous and loyal among fallen celestials.

Domains: fire, loyalty, vigor

Merge

Glyphclaws

You are immune to shaken and weak.

Once per turn during a conflict, you may perform the Skill action to deal an amount of physical damage equal to 【10 + twice the number of Heroic Skills you have acquired】 to each of up to two enemies you can see. If you do and at least one of those enemies loses Hit Points due to this damage, you gain 1 Glyph Point.

When this Arcanum is dismissed, you lose all Glyph Points.

Dismiss

Seal of Fire

You deal 30 fire damage to one enemy you can see; this damage ignores Immunities and Resistances. If you lost 3 or more Glyph Points by dismissing this Arcanum, choose one option for this effect:

  • It deals 10 extra damage.

  • It deals damage to each of up to two enemies you can see (instead of only one enemy).

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.DZLOjMQSHt5LB5Vf]{Rangda}

The powerful witch queen, teacher of dark arts.

Domains: medicine, poisons, witchcraft

Merge

Haunting Dance

After you and/or one or more allies you can see lose Hit Points, you gain 1 Sorcery Point.

All damage you deal becomes poison, its type cannot change, and you deal extra damage equal to your current Sorcery Points.

When this Arcanum is dismissed, you lose all Sorcery Points.

Dismiss

Feast of Body and Soul

You deal an amount of poison damage equal to 【the amount of Sorcery Points you lost by dismissing this Arcanum, multiplied by 5】 to one enemy you can see. If this damage reduces that enemy to 0 Hit Points, you and every ally you can see recover an amount of HP and MP equal to that enemy's Crisis score.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.29oLW7n3OmgpzURY]{Tiamat}

The Dragonmother, reigning over oceans and serpents.

Domains: chaos, saltwater, serpents

Merge

Supreme Serpent

You gain Resistance to ice damage.

When you deal damage, as long as that damage is ice, you deal 5 extra damage and all that damage ignores Resistances.

Once per turn during a conflict, you may perform the Skill action to perform a free attack with a weapon you have equipped. If you do, all damage dealt by the attack becomes ice, its type cannot change, and each creature that loses Hit Points due to it suffers slow.

Dismiss

Tides of an Endless Ocean

Choose one option:

  • Fill 2 sections of every Clock present on the scene.

  • Erase 2 sections of every Clock present on the scene.

  • You force every soldier-rank enemy present on the scene that is in Crisis and is not a Villain to immediately leave the scene.

Once you use any of its options, this dismiss effect is no longer available until next dawn.
